changelog: Compatibility: targets Jellyfin 12.0.0.0 beta while keeping plugin version 1.7.0.0. Scheduler: exposes Poster Rotator tasks for rotating posters and cleaning orphan pools. Interface: keeps two pages for Pools and Parametres, simplifies rotation limits, and fixes pool image previews. Packaging: includes a local plugin image for manual zip installs.
description: Fill a local poster pool per movie from providers, then periodically rotate the Primary Poster image from the pool. This keeps Jellyfin looking fresh with rotating poster images on an interval of your choosing.
name: Poster Rotator
